content: This website is a way for me to express myself. I wanted to create a personal space on the internet that reflects me.
I've always loved the idea that everyone is connected on the cyberspace. This gave me the motivation to create a place where everyone can connect with me and other cool people.

At this moment the site is still in early development and i plan to add all sorts of things and features that i think about. I want this to be an open space where i allow myself to post whatever i want, whenever i want and however i want.

The design just came along the way. There is not really a deep reason behind it, i feel like, but during this journey of developing these ideas, I started to feel pretty good about it recently. It just feels right. Also seeing all the time put into this becoming something real is starting to make me love doing this and it's making me want more, there are limitless ideas that i can paint in this website.
